columns.extraction_plan: The Functional Assessment of Cancer Therapy-Prostate (National Comprehensive Cancer Network) symptom index 17-item questionnaire was used to measure "time to worsening of disease-related physical symptoms" as a secondary efficacy end point. This is stated on page 3 under "Study Assessments". Table 2 on page 8 reports the results for "Time to worsening disease-related symptoms".
